name: general-service-pattern
description: "Implement consistent backend CRUD services and controllers using typed ReturnResult<T>, thin controllers, service-layer validations, ownership checks, repository usage, and consistent error handling. Use when creating new API modules across projects."
---

# General Backend Service Pattern Skill

Use this skill whenever you add or update CRUD APIs in backend projects that follow a layered Controller -> Service -> Repository architecture.

## Contents

- [Scope and fixed conventions](./rules/scope-and-conventions.md)
- [ReturnResult rules](./rules/return-result-rules.md)
- [Controller and service templates](./rules/templates.md)
- [API contracts and implementation checklist](./rules/api-contracts-and-checklist.md)

## Usage

Read all linked files before implementing a new module. Apply these rules consistently across controller, service, and repository layers.
